_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.

_contextSnippet: tumor cells in spheroids were more sensitive to 806 CAR-T cells than those cultured in 2D. As shown in Figure S4E, 806-EP along with other groups achieved complete tumor elimination at a E:T ratio of 0.25:1
details: Tumor cells in spheroids were more sensitive to 806 CAR-T cells than those cultured in 2D, achieving complete elimination at E:T ratio of 0.25:1
